---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve the H747 Elite robot
title: '[BUG] '
labels: needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Power on robot at '...'
2. Send command '....'
3. Wait for '....'
4. Observe error at '....'

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include any error codes, LED patterns, or unexpected behavior.

## Firmware Version
- Build tag/commit: <!-- e.g., v1.2.3 or a5b3c8f -->
- Build date: <!-- if known -->

## Hardware Revision
- PCB revision: <!-- e.g., Rev B, Rev C -->
- Motor type: <!-- e.g., 12N14P BLDC -->
- Battery type: <!-- e.g., 4S 5200mAh LiPo -->

## Serial Number
Serial number of the affected unit: <!-- e.g., H747-2025-00042 -->

## Logs
Attach relevant log output. For firmware logs, connect via UART (115200 baud) and capture at least 30 seconds of logs leading up to the failure.

```
Paste log snippets here if attachment is not possible
```

## Additional Context
- Frequency of occurrence: <!-- Always / Sometimes / Once -->
- Does the issue persist after power cycle? (Yes/No)
- Ambient temperature/humidity (if relevant):
- Any recent changes or modifications:

## Screenshots / Videos
If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain the problem.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have included serial number of the affected unit
- [ ] I have attached log files
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues before filing this report
